The Moon in jayestha:Virtuous, irritable at times, musical gifts, obstinate

NAKSHATRA JAYESTHA
THE CHIEF STAR. THE SENIORMOST.MOST EXCELLENT.PRE‐EMINENT.
The moon in Jyeshtha indicates a person with a sense of seniority and
superiority, who is protective, responsible and a leader of their family. They
are wise, profound, psychic, maybe with occult powers, and are courageous
and inventive. They may experience poverty and hardship in life and can be
reclusive and secretive
The Sun in Jyestha: Attains fame but desires seclusion, ambitious nature,
hard working, high social status, good executive ability, family obligations and
responsibilities, imaginative and innovative mind.
Career Interests: Self-employed, management leaders,Military leaders,
